---
title: Technical guide
bibliography: references.bib
sidebar: main
page-navigation: true
---

The technical guide collects the supporting material for using pySLAMMER with confidence: vocabulary, the bundled ground motion suite, and verification against the legacy SLAMMER program.

## Sections

* [Glossary](glossary.qmd) — terms and conventions used throughout the documentation.
* [Sample ground motion suite](ground_motions.qmd) — the recorded motions bundled with pySLAMMER and their characteristics.
* [Verification with SLAMMER's results](comp_SLAMMER_results.qmd) — comparison of pySLAMMER's rigid, decoupled, and coupled analyses against the legacy SLAMMER outputs across the bundled motion suite.
* [API reference](../api/index.qmd) — auto-generated reference for every public class and function.

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon

A full technical manual covering the analysis methods (rigid Newmark integration, the Rathje-Bray decoupled approach, the Coupled formulation with the Lee 2004 foundation-radiation damping correction), the equivalent-linear site response loop, and pySLAMMER's algorithmic choices is in preparation. Until then, the [SLAMMER verification page](comp_SLAMMER_results.qmd) and the [forthcoming SoftwareX paper](https://github.com/lornearnold/manuscript_pyslammer) are the most complete written references.
:::
